message:
test(proptest): add 21 property tests for connector data classification end-to-end coverage

Covers classify_event (structural fields, overall sensitivity, nested
payload, secret detection, truncation, metadata), redact_event (payload
removal, metadata redaction, audit entry creation), decision telemetry
tracking (accept/reject/quarantine), audit log bounds, audit_log_json
serialization, and ClassificationAuditEntry serde roundtrip. Total: 70
property tests (up from 49).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
